title: Design and Installation of Ducts
full_text:
5.2.2.1 Design and Installation of Ducts
Design and Installation of Ducts
1) Ducts shall be designed and installed in accordance with the NBC. (See
Note A-5.2.2.1.(1).)

sentences.text: Ducts shall be designed and installed in accordance with the NBC. (See Note A-5.2.2.1.(1).)
